Verify that a passive WAL frame checksum matches its body.

## Import

```ts
import { verifyWalFrameChecksum } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function verifyWalFrameChecksum(frame: WalFrame<T>): Promise<boolean>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `frame` | `WalFrame<T>` | Frame to encode or validate. |

## Returns

A `Promise<boolean>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { verifyWalFrameChecksum } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```
